name: elevenlabs-matrix-display
title: LED Matrix Display
author: ElevenLabs UI
description: Renders accessible animated LED matrices from frames, patterns, or live volume levels.

changes: Changed project aliases to bundled source-local imports and normalized formatting.
Added native reduced-motion detection that freezes autoplay while retaining caller-supplied static patterns.
Removed the unrelated site URL helper, kept the upstream cn utility, normalized formatting, and made the closure source-local.

modifications.change: Changed project aliases to bundled source-local imports and normalized formatting. Added native reduced-motion detection that freezes autoplay while retaining caller-supplied static patterns.
modifications.reason: Keep the copied component install-complete, source-local, accessible, and production-safe without changing its core upstream design.
